atuacao.heading:
From the origin

to the launch.
atuacao.intro: Open Group does not merely take part in projects — it structures the real estate opportunity, aligning potential, capital, partners, and execution in the same direction.

01.title: Reading the opportunity
01.desc: Understanding the asset, its stage, and its real development potential.

02.title: Market intelligence
02.desc: Local market context, demand, and competitive analysis that underpin the thesis.

03.title: Development concept
03.desc: Defining the logic of the real estate product: unit mix, typology, and positioning.

04.title: Feasibility
04.desc: Financial and institutional analysis that unlocks the path of the venture.

05.title: Structuring the venture
05.desc: Modeling so that potential, capital, and execution move in the same direction.

06.title: Connecting with partners
06.desc: Bringing partners together and managing the bank relationship, including CEF (Brazil's federal bank) when applicable.

07.title: Launch readiness
07.desc: Commercial strategy and guidance of the venture until it is ready to move forward.

modelos.heading:
Flexible engagement based on

the profile of the opportunity.
modelos.intro: Each opportunity calls for its own logic. Open Group assesses the stage, the potential, and the complexity of the venture to define the most suitable engagement model.

consultoria.title: Contracted consulting
consultoria.desc: We support the structuring of the venture with strategic reading and technical guidance, within a defined scope.

parceria.title: Strategic partnership
parceria.desc: We work side by side on building the development, sharing vision, structure, and direction.

societaria.title: Equity participation
societaria.desc: We come in as partners in the venture, committed to the result of the development from end to end.

manifesto.line2: Before the launch, there is the structure.
manifesto.body1: Open Group Real Estate Development works on the structuring and development of real estate ventures, guiding opportunities from concept to launch.
manifesto.body2: Our work begins before construction: in reading the opportunity, in feasibility analysis, in the strategic design of the venture, and in bringing together the partners needed for the project to move forward with consistency.
manifesto.body3: We work alongside builders, developers, companies holding real estate assets, and investors, combining strategic vision, financial and institutional structuring, connection with partners, and guidance through the critical market stages.

clientes.heading:
Who trusts

Open Group.
clientes.intro: Developers, builders, funds, and landowners who structured their ventures with Open Group, from origin to launch.

rail.ariaLabel: Visual navigation of the About page

meta.title: About
meta.description: Open Group structures and develops real estate ventures, guiding opportunities from concept to launch. Value is born before ground is broken.

about.heading: Our work begins before ground is broken.
about.body1: Open Group Real Estate Development works on the structuring and development of real estate ventures, guiding opportunities from concept to launch.
about.body2: Our work begins before construction: in reading the opportunity, in feasibility analysis, in the strategic design of the venture, and in bringing together the partners needed for the project to move forward with consistency.
about.body3: We work alongside builders, developers, companies holding real estate assets, and investors — combining strategic vision, financial and institutional structuring, connection with partners, and guidance through the critical market stages.
about.body4: More than developing projects, we structure real estate ventures so that potential, capital, and execution move in the same direction.

segments.s1: Many opportunities don't fail for lack of
segments.s3: . They fail because they move forward without

origem.heading: The value of a development is born before ground is broken.
origem.intro: A promising site or a well-located project does not stand on its own. Without vision, feasibility, partners, and guidance, potential disperses before it becomes a development. It is born earlier — and it is born here:

01.name: Reading the opportunity
01.desc: Interpreting the asset and its real potential, before it becomes obvious.

02.name: Product conception
02.desc: Defining the right development for that opportunity.

03.name: Structuring the venture
03.desc: Aligning potential, capital, and execution in the same direction.

04.name: Choosing the partners
04.desc: Bringing together partners, the bank, and institutional relationships.

05.name: The path to launch
05.desc: Guiding with clarity until the project is ready to move forward.

lideranca.heading: The leadership behind every structured venture.
lideranca.intro: Open Group is led by professionals who combine strategic vision, command of the real estate venture, and institutional relationships — to turn opportunities into developments ready to move forward.

max.statement: Before developing a project, you must see the value that hasn't yet been revealed.
max.quote1: At the helm of Open Group, Flying Studio, NID Studio, and Rinno Films, I lead an ecosystem created to turn real estate opportunities into clearer, more feasible ventures, ready to move forward.
max.quote2: Each company works on one stage of the journey, from strategy to communication, always with the same vision: to develop with structure from the very origin.

grupo.heading: Our Group
grupo.intro: Strategy, architecture, visualization, and audiovisual work as complementary forces. Each company deepens one stage of the journey: to structure, to design, to anticipate, and to communicate.

flying.text: The machine for anticipating futures. Images and 3D renders, apps, D.Brave, and immersive rooms transport the client into their future reality — over 12 years translating brick and concrete into pure visual poetry.

ogdi.text: The strategic starting point. We provide consulting focused on market intelligence, product development, and the complete structuring of new launches from their very conception.

nid.role: Architecture, interiors, and point of sale
nid.text: Where architectural intelligence takes shape and emotion. The home as a true nest: interior projects, facade design, and points of sale conceived as spaces of comfort, security, and strong personality.

rinno.text: The group's audiovisual studio. From concept and product films to viral and institutional pieces — bringing motion to stories and creating the emotional connection between the project and its audience.

assinatura.heading:
We turn opportunities into

developments ready to move forward.
assinatura.sub: Guiding structuring, feasibility, partners, and the path to launch, with strategic vision. Develop with vision from the very origin.

hero.title:
Developments

structured at the origin.
hero.sub: From reading the opportunity to launch — each project reflects Open Group's work in structuring the real estate venture.

cta.title: Have a site or project with potential?
cta.text: Bring us the opportunity. We do the first reading and outline the next steps of the venture.

meta.description: Developers, builders, funds and landowners who structure their ventures with Open Group — from origin to launch.

rail.ariaLabel: Visual navigation of the clients page

hero.title:
Every venture is born from

a relationship of trust.

01.title: Developers
01.desc: Structuring and guidance of ventures — from reading the opportunity and feasibility to launch readiness.

02.title: Builders
02.desc: Qualified origination and structured ventures, with defined roles and milestones, to build with predictability.
entregas: Connecting with partners and the bank

03.title: Funds and investors
03.desc: Qualified capital enters before launch, within structures defined by the venture — SCP, asset swap or co-investment.

04.title: Landowners
04.desc: The land enters as capital in the venture — and the owner shares in the development's outcome.
entregas: Land as capital, via asset swap

relacao.intro: Three depths of involvement — the relationship can begin within one scope and grow with the venture.

01.title: Contracted consulting
01.desc: Defined scope: reading the opportunity, market intelligence or feasibility — delivered as a project.
01.quando: To validate an opportunity or unlock a specific decision.

02.title: Strategic partnership
02.desc: Open Group stays in the guidance role: structuring the venture, connecting with partners and launch readiness.
02.quando: To carry the entire venture forward under a single guidance.

03.title: Partner in the venture
03.desc: Participation in the venture itself — potential, capital and execution in the same direction, with shared outcomes.
03.quando: To share risk and outcome in ventures of greater potential.

compromissos.heading:
Trust is built

with method.
compromissos.intro: Four commitments hold for any client profile and any form of relationship — from the first scope to partnership in the venture.

01.title: Our own intelligence
01.desc: Market, local market and competitive reading done by the team — every recommendation is born from data, not from a generic thesis.

02.title: Defined roles and milestones
02.desc: Scope, responsibilities and milestones set under contract, defined when structuring the venture.

03.title: Single guidance
03.desc: One party responsible from origination to launch — including coordination with partners and the relationship with the bank, with CEF (Brazil's federal bank) where applicable.

04.title: Transparency at every stage
04.desc: The client follows the state of the venture at each stage completed: what advanced, what comes next and what changed along the way.

operacoes.heading: Trust, in practice.
operacoes.intro: In the ventures of the current portfolio, Open Group is a partner in the venture — potential, capital and execution in the same direction.

perguntas.heading:
What those who arrive

usually ask.
perguntas.asideText: Didn't find your question? <link>Talk to the team</link>.

01.q: How does a relationship with Open Group begin?
01.a: With the presentation of the opportunity — the asset, the land or the project. The team makes the first reading and returns with the possible next steps.

02.q: Does Open Group carry out construction?
02.a: No. Execution belongs to the building partners — Open Group structures and guides the venture, connecting the right roles at each stage.

03.q: At what point does capital enter the venture?
03.a: At structuring, before launch — the phase in which value is created. The participation models are detailed on the investors page.

04.q: Can the scope grow over the course of the venture?
04.a: Yes. The relationship can begin as contracted consulting and evolve into a strategic partnership or partnership in the venture, as it makes sense for both sides.

cta.title: Have a venture to structure?
cta.text: Present the opportunity — we make the first reading and indicate the next steps.

meta.title: Investors
meta.description: Qualified capital enters before the launch — at the stage where value is created. Discover Open Group's thesis, the venture cycle, and the participation models.

rail.ariaLabel: Visual navigation for the investors page

hero.title:
Value is born before ground is broken.

So is the chance to invest, too.
hero.intro: Open Group structures real estate ventures and opens room for qualified capital to enter before the launch — at the stage where value is created.

01.title: We enter early.
01.desc: A development's value is created during structuring — reading the opportunity, the product, and the venture — before construction begins.

02.title: We read the market.
02.desc: Every venture is born from market intelligence and a feasibility study, not from a bet.

03.title: We guide it to the end.
03.desc: From origination to launch, the same guidance — and the investor follows every milestone of the venture.

ciclo.intro: Capital enters during structuring — and takes part in the creation of value, not just in the result.

modelos.heading:
Structures defined

by the venture — not the other way around.
modelos.footer: Each structure is defined case by case, according to the venture — with no promise of results.

scp.desc: Capital takes part in a specific venture, with scope, roles, and milestones defined by contract.

permuta.desc: The land enters as capital in the venture — the owner shares in the development's result.

coinvest.desc: Investment together with Open Group and strategic partners in structuring the venture.

governanca.heading:
The entire venture,

under a single lead.
governanca.intro: Investing before construction requires seeing the venture. That's why Open Group guides with order: defined milestones, step-by-step reporting, and a single lead from start to launch.

01.title: Defined milestones
01.desc: Every venture advances through clear milestones, defined during structuring — from unlocking feasibility to launch readiness.

02.title: Step-by-step reporting
02.desc: The investor receives the state of the venture at each completed stage: what advanced, what comes next, and what changed along the way.

03.title: A single lead
03.desc: The guidance is Open Group's — from coordinating partners and the bank to the commercial strategy. One lead for the entire venture.

operacoes.heading: Ventures under guidance.
operacoes.intro: In all of them, Open Group is the partner in the venture — capital enters where value is born.

capital.title: I have capital to invest
capital.desc: Talk with the team about the ventures under structuring.

terreno.title: I have land or an asset
terreno.desc: Present the area — we make the first reading of the opportunity.
